'''鈭歫-r-v''' ('''jarava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tune|tune]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tune|tune]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-r-v
|-
! Lemma
| jarava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jaravithi|jaravithi]] || [[word:jaraviji|jaraviji]] || [[word:jaravishi|jaravishi]] || [[word:jaravi|jaravi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaravuthuth|jaravuthuth]] || [[word:jaravujuj|jaravujuj]] || [[word:jaravushush|jaravushush]] || [[word:jarav|jarav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaravuthu|jaravuthu]] || [[word:jaravuju|jaravuju]] || [[word:jaravushu|jaravushu]] || [[word:jaravu|jaravu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jaravufuth|jaravufuth]] || [[word:jaravufuj|jaravufuj]] || [[word:jaravufush|jaravufush]] || [[word:jaravuf|jaravuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jaravethe|jaravethe]] || [[word:jaraveje|jaraveje]] || [[word:jaraveshe|jaraveshe]] || [[word:jarave|jarave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaravothoth|jaravothoth]] || [[word:jaravojoj|jaravojoj]] || [[word:jaravoshosh|jaravoshosh]] || [[word:jarav|jarav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaravotho|jaravotho]] || [[word:jaravojo|jaravojo]] || [[word:jaravosho|jaravosho]] || [[word:jaravo|jaravo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jaravofoth|jaravofoth]] || [[word:jaravofoj|jaravofoj]] || [[word:jaravofosh|jaravofosh]] || [[word:jaravof|jaravof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jarav忙th忙|jarav忙th忙]] || [[word:jarav忙j忙|jarav忙j忙]] || [[word:jarav忙sh忙|jarav忙sh忙]] || [[word:jarav忙|jarav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaravathath|jaravathath]] || [[word:jaravajaj|jaravajaj]] || [[word:jaravashash|jaravashash]] || [[word:jarav|jarav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaravatha|jaravatha]] || [[word:jaravaja|jaravaja]] || [[word:jaravasha|jaravasha]] || [[word:jarava|jarava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jaravafath|jaravafath]] || [[word:jaravafaj|jaravafaj]] || [[word:jaravafash|jaravafash]] || [[word:jaravaf|jaravaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jaravasha|jaravasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojaravasha|gojaravasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijaravasha|gokijaravasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jaravn眉sha|jaravn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojaravnkn眉sha|gojaravnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijaravn眉sha|gokijaravn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jaravsh毛sha|jaravsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojaravnksh毛sha|gojaravnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijaravsh毛sha|gokijaravsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jaravrosha|jaravrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaravnkrosha|gojaravnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaravrosha|gokijaravrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jaravmusha|jaravmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaravnkmusha|gojaravnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaravmusha|gokijaravmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jaravsherasha|jaravsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojaravnksherasha|gojaravnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijaravsherasha|gokijaravsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jaravngasha|jaravngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojaravnkngasha|gojaravnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijaravngasha|gokijaravngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jaravyasha|jaravyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojaravnkyasha|gojaravnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijaravyasha|gokijaravyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jaravyamasha|jaravyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojaravnkyamasha|gojaravnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijaravyamasha|gokijaravyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jaravn眉sh毛sha|jaravn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojaravnkn眉sh毛sha|gojaravnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijaravn眉sh毛sha|gokijaravn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jaravn眉rosha|jaravn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaravnkn眉rosha|gojaravnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaravn眉rosha|gokijaravn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaravn眉musha|jaravn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaravnkn眉musha|gojaravnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaravn眉musha|gokijaravn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jaravsh毛n眉sha|jaravsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojaravnksh毛n眉sha|gojaravnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijaravsh毛n眉sha|gokijaravsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jaravsh毛rosha|jaravsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaravnksh毛rosha|gojaravnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaravsh毛rosha|gokijaravsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaravsh毛musha|jaravsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaravnksh毛musha|gojaravnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaravsh毛musha|gokijaravsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jaravron眉sha|jaravron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojaravnkron眉sha|gojaravnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijaravron眉sha|gokijaravron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jaravrosh毛sha|jaravrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojaravnkrosh毛sha|gojaravnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijaravrosh毛sha|gokijaravrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaravromusha|jaravromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaravnkromusha|gojaravnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaravromusha|gokijaravromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jaravmun眉sha|jaravmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojaravnkmun眉sha|gojaravnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijaravmun眉sha|gokijaravmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jaravmush毛sha|jaravmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojaravnkmush毛sha|gojaravnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijaravmush毛sha|gokijaravmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jaravmurosha|jaravmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojaravnkmurosha|gojaravnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijaravmurosha|gokijaravmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jarav|jarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙r忙v|j忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojarav|hojarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙r忙v|hoj忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojarav|hohojarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙r忙v|hohoj忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉jarav|n眉jarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙r忙v|n眉j忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉jarav|n眉n眉jarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙r忙v|n眉n眉j忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂jarav|n茂jarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙r忙v|n茂j忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂jarav|n茂n茂jarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙r忙v|n茂n茂j忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujarav|lujarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙r忙v|luj忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujarav|lulujarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙r忙v|luluj忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijarav|lijarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙r忙v|lij忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijarav|lilijarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙r忙v|lilij忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojarav|kojarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙r忙v|koj忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojarav|kokojarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙r忙v|kokoj忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejarav|kejarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙r忙v|kej忙r忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejarav|kekejarav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙r忙v|kekej忙r忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
